IExtensibilityService Interface

One Identity Manager API Server
The IExtensibilityService provides light-weight access to plug-ins defined in dynamically loaded assemblies.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public interface IExtensibilityService

The IExtensibilityService type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
Add
Tells the service to look for exporting types in the specified assembly.
GetT
Gets all the exports with the specified type parameter.
Remove
Top
Extension Methods
  NameDescription
FindAttributeBasedApiProvidersT
Looks up all API providers that implement the IApiProviderForT interface.
